title: Xenium Dual Chemistry (Prime 5K + Custom V1)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"cim5g","text":"We developed a 'dual chemistry' method that combines the high sensitivity of a 10X Genomics Xenium V1 custom panel (up to 480 genes) with the broad coverage of the Prime 5K panel (5001 genes) on a single tissue section. This involved co-hybridizing Prime and V1 probes and sequentially running the V1 and Prime decoding chemistries.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Arianna Williams-Katek
